summary: TemaDom Iteration 19 - Complete testing of new features: AI Gallery publishing with PDF download, AI Sketch page for blueprint analysis, and navbar logo fix. All 14 backend tests passed. All 13 frontend UI checks passed.

issues: Console warnings: DialogContent missing DialogTitle/aria-describedby for accessibility - minor

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/ai-designer/publish - returns project_id with valid data
✅ GET /api/ai-designer/published - returns projects list with pagination
✅ GET /api/ai-designer/published/{id} - returns project with views increment
✅ Logo is correctly sized (90px height on desktop, 65px on mobile)
✅ Navbar 'Още' dropdown button found and opens
✅ AI Gallery page (/ai-gallery) loads with published-gallery-page element
✅ AI Gallery shows 2 published project cards
✅ Gallery card click opens modal with before/after images
✅ Modal shows PDF Images button (PDF с изображения)
✅ Modal shows PDF Materials button (PDF количествена сметка)
✅ AI Sketch page (/ai-sketch) loads with ai-sketch-page element
✅ AI Sketch has 3 upload zones for files
✅ AI Sketch has 5 building type selectors
✅ AI Sketch analyze button disabled when no files
✅ AI Designer page (/ai-designer) loads with step indicators
✅ Mobile menu includes AI Sketch link
✅ Mobile menu includes AI Галерия link
critical_code_review_comments: All new endpoints are properly implemented and functional
PDF generation works correctly with DejaVu fonts for Bulgarian text
Views counter increments correctly on project detail fetch
AI Sketch endpoint properly validates required sketches array
Gallery modal accessibility: Consider adding DialogTitle and aria-describedby for screen reader support
seed_data_creation: Created test project via POST /api/ai-designer/publish during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom Iteration 19 fully tested. NEW features verified: 1) POST /api/ai-designer/publish - publishes AI project to gallery with before/after images, materials, dimensions, 2) GET /api/ai-designer/published - lists published projects with pagination, 3) GET /api/ai-designer/published/{id} - returns full project with views increment, 4) GET /api/ai-designer/published/{id}/pdf/images - generates PDF with before/after images, 5) GET /api/ai-designer/published/{id}/pdf/materials - generates PDF with quantity survey, 6) POST /api/ai-sketch/analyze - analyzes sketches for structural elements, 7) /ai-gallery frontend page shows gallery cards and modal with PDF buttons, 8) /ai-sketch frontend page with upload zones, building type selector, notes field, 9) Navbar 'Още' dropdown has AI Дизайнер/AI Sketch/AI Галерия links, 10) Mobile menu has AI Sketch and AI Галерия links, 11) Logo is bigger (h-[90px] on desktop) and left-aligned. Test project ID for reference: d54cb750-0a3a-4845-8460-0eb714f6ccf9

publish_endpoint.details: POST /api/ai-designer/publish validates generated_images and returns project_id

published_detail_endpoint.details: GET /api/ai-designer/published/{id} returns project and increments views

ai_sketch_endpoint.details: POST /api/ai-sketch/analyze validates sketches array and processes analysis

ai_gallery_page.details: Page loads with project cards, modal with before/after and PDF buttons

ai_sketch_page.details: Page loads with 3 upload zones, 5 building types, notes field

navbar_dropdown.details: 'Още' dropdown has AI Дизайнер, AI Sketch, AI Галерия links

mobile_menu.details: Mobile menu has AI Sketch and AI Галерия links

logo_fix.details: Logo is 90px height on desktop, 65px on mobile, left-aligned in container
